schema.formLabel: What type of job is it?

options.formLabel: Foundations for a structure to be built
options.helpText: E.g. Foundations for extension, new build, outbuilding or shed

next.formLabel: What do you want foundations for?
Add a description to your job
next.placeholder: Include any details you think the tradesperson should know (approx. foundation size, timeframe, etc.)

next.helpText: More tradespeople express interest in jobs that have a descriptive name.

next.formLabel: Would you like to add any photos or plans?
next.helpText: Photos give tradespeople more context and details to understand the job and provide a more accurate quote.

next.formLabel: Describe your earthworks job in detail
next.helpText: Good descriptions attract good tradespeople. Describe what what you need doing in detail, including roughly how large an area is involved. How accessible is the site?
next.placeholder: E.g. Level garden. Currently slopped. Having a new wall built with steps. Garden to levelled off and trench left for the wall foundations. Garden approx 65ft

next.helpText: Good descriptions attract good tradespeople. What needs to be done? Provide details of the tasks and size of the area involved. What kind of access is there for machinery.
next.placeholder: E.g. Foundations dug for house rear extension (6x3m). Currently a patio. Access via driveway and rear gate...
